name: Woven Portable Cordless Table Light - Threshold™
description:
Add warm lighting anywhere in your home with this Woven Portable Cordless Table Light from Threshold™. Designed with a rattan body and shade, this stylish lamp brings a soft, cozy glow to shelves, nightstands and more. Its cordless design makes it easy to move around your space, while the touch-activated sensor and three light settings let you set the mood in seconds. Fully assembled and ready to use, it’s an easy way to bring relaxed ambiance wherever you need it.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
